watch-the-target-jump-read-the-letter-ea.text: Watch the target jump. Read the letter each time it flashes.

nice-now-let-s-check-your-far-vision-sta.text: Nice. Now let's check your far vision. Stand back — arm's length from your screen, or across the room if you're on a monitor.

a-single-striped-patch-flashes-at-the-ce.text: A single striped patch flashes at the center — call its direction before it fades from view.

add-gentle-step-back-once-accuracy-hits-.text: Add gentle step-back once accuracy hits 95%.

alternate-near-40-cm-vs-far-2-m-projecti.text: Alternate near (40 cm) vs. far (2 m) projections every loop.

alternate-reading-near-card-vs-far-card-.text: Alternate reading near card vs. far card every inhale/exhale.

anchor-chin-with-a-light-nod-imagine-ear.text: Anchor chin with a light nod; imagine ears growing tall.

answer-on-the-3-count-beat-using-the-lef.text: Answer on the 3-count beat using the LEFT / RIGHT buttons.

answer-the-letter-check-ins-without-look.text: Answer the letter check-ins without looking away — that proves your eyes did the sweeping, not your head.
Answer the letter check-ins without looking away — that proves you stayed centered.

box-breathing-plus-soft-focus-on-a-singl.text: Box breathing plus soft focus on a single point to prime for accuracy work.

chin-level-only-your-eyes-sweep-a7c0c95f.text: Chin level — only your eyes sweep.

classic-near-to-far-bead-drill-to-teach-.text: Classic near-to-far bead drill to teach convergence/divergence control at conscious speeds.

cross-body-ocular-limb-coordination-to-r.text: Cross-body ocular + limb coordination to reduce midline confusion and boost depth perception.

darkness-warmth-diaphragmatic-breathing-.text: Darkness + warmth + diaphragmatic breathing to downshift the nervous system before neural drills.

diagonal-targets-join-in-as-you-level-up.text: Diagonal targets join in as you level up — track them the same way.

dynamic-near-far-toggles-inspired-by-opt.text: Dynamic near/far toggles inspired by optometry accommodative therapy.

every-session-rewires-done-is-what-count.text: Every session rewires. Done is what counts.

exhale-as-the-card-approaches-to-keep-pa.text: Exhale as the card approaches to keep parasympathetic tone high.

exhale-until-you-feel-abdominal-wall-sof.text: Exhale until you feel abdominal wall soften; notice when the darkness deepens.

follow-the-loop-with-smooth-continuous-m.text: Follow the loop with smooth, continuous motion — eyes only, no head movement.

follow-the-target-left-and-right-eyes-on.text: Follow the target left and right. Eyes only, head still.

forced-choice-orientation-calls-on-a-fai.text: Forced-choice orientation calls on a faint striped patch, adapting to find your contrast-sensitivity edge.

from-week-5-listen-for-rule-flip-same-si.text: From week 5, listen for "Rule flip" — same side instead of crossed.

glutes-lightly-engaged-avoid-head-bobbin.text: Glutes lightly engaged, avoid head bobbing.

high-velocity-saccades-between-targets-t.text: High-velocity saccades between targets to sharpen reaction time and reading endurance.

hold-your-card-at-arm-s-length-and-follo.text: Hold your card at arm’s length and follow the rhythm.

hold-your-gaze-on-the-center-letter-don-.text: Hold your gaze on the center letter — don’t chase the target.

hold-your-gaze-on-the-center-letter-whil.text: Hold your gaze on the center letter while targets flash in each quadrant.

hold-your-phone-securely-keep-your-path-.text: Hold your phone securely. Keep your path clear and walk slowly.

hum-quietly-to-add-auditory-task-for-dua.text: Hum quietly to add auditory task for dual-load practice.

identifies-objects-without-direct-gaze-t.text: Identifies objects without direct gaze to expand spatial mapping and reduce tunnel vision.

if-blur-persists-longer-than-2-sec-move-.text: If blur persists longer than 2 sec, move closer and reset.

if-clarity-holds-at-60-cm-step-back-2-cm.text: If clarity holds at 60 cm, step back 2 cm and repeat.

if-head-drifts-1-cm-slow-down-and-reset-.text: If head drifts >1 cm, slow down and reset posture.

ignore-the-faint-decoy-patches-tap-only-.text: Ignore the faint decoy patches — tap only the bright one

imagine-distant-horizon-lines-to-widen-f.text: Imagine distant horizon lines to widen field even with eyes closed.

inhale-4-hold-4-exhale-4-hold-4-while-ey.text: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4 while eyes remain gently fixed.

inhale-4-sec-nose-hold-2-exhale-6-throug.text: Inhale 4 sec nose • hold 2 • exhale 6 through lips.

inhale-along-the-left-arc-exhale-along-t.text: Inhale along the left arc, exhale along the right.

jump-your-gaze-to-each-target-as-it-flas.text: Jump your gaze to each target as it flashes, on the beat.

keep-crown-lifted-imagine-strings-pullin.text: Keep crown lifted, imagine strings pulling upward.

keep-rib-flare-down-only-arms-move-ea729.text: Keep rib flare down; only arms move.

large-infinity-tracing-with-varied-dista.text: Large infinity tracing with varied distances to challenge fixation and prevent fatigue.

last-one-down-one-quick-vision-check-the.text: Last one down. One quick vision check, then your report.

let-your-eyes-stay-soft-don-t-squint-to-.text: Let your eyes stay soft — don’t squint to force clarity, guess your best read.

letter-flashes-left-or-right-tap-the-opp.text: Letter flashes left or right — tap the opposite button, crossed response.

mirror-provides-instant-feedback-on-head.text: Mirror provides instant feedback on head stillness while eyes sweep in quadrants.

move-your-screen-just-a-finger-width-fur.text: Move your screen just a finger-width further. Tiny steps build strength!

nasal-breath-throughout-sigh-out-if-tens.text: Nasal breath throughout; sigh out if tension spikes.

no-rush-but-answer-before-the-10-second-.text: No rush, but answer before the 10-second window closes.

notice-micro-movements-try-to-minimize-t.text: Notice micro-movements; try to minimize them each hold.

notice-the-loop-grow-wide-then-shrink-ti.text: Notice the loop grow wide, then shrink tight, over the course of the set.

now-cup-your-palms-gently-over-your-eyes.text: Now cup your palms gently over your eyes. Keep breathing with the count.

now-read-the-direction-of-each-e-f637859.text: Now read the direction of each E.

now-the-infinity-path-smooth-and-steady-.text: Now the infinity path. Smooth and steady.

now-vertical-loops-eyes-only-head-still-.text: Now vertical loops. Eyes only, head still.

one-respiratory-cycle-per-switch-keeps-m.text: One respiratory cycle per switch keeps motion steady.

one-syllable-per-step-slow-down-if-blur-.text: One syllable per step; slow down if blur creeps in.

pause-where-blur-appears-breathe-out-rec.text: Pause where blur appears, breathe out, reclaim clarity, continue.

peak-block-coming-this-is-the-one-that-c.text: Peak block coming — this is the one that counts.

pick-a-neutral-object-at-eye-height-84be.text: Pick a neutral object at eye height.

project-or-imagine-a-1m-wide-infinity-sy.text: Project or imagine a 1m-wide infinity symbol.

read-the-line-then-call-it-clear-or-blur.text: Read the line, then call it clear or blurry — it updates every few steps.

recall-the-center-letter-the-instant-a-c.text: Recall the center letter the instant a check-in appears

recall-the-center-letter-without-breakin.text: Recall the center letter without breaking fixation

record-both-near-and-far-snellen-scores-.text: Record both near and far Snellen scores

relax-jaw-and-tongue-to-reduce-trigemina.text: Relax jaw and tongue to reduce trigeminal stress on ocular nerves.

repeat-for-four-rounds-before-harder-dri.text: Repeat for four rounds before harder drills.

rub-palms-to-create-heat-then-cup-over-s.text: Rub palms to create heat then cup over sockets without pressure.

say-the-letter-aloud-to-confirm-clarity-.text: Say the letter aloud to confirm clarity.

session-complete-look-at-what-you-just-d.text: Session complete. Look at what you just did.

settle-in-and-follow-the-orb-a456b0c5.text: Settle in and follow the orb.

showing-up-is-the-win-today-d4dd7606.text: Showing up is the win today.

slide-target-toward-nose-in-0-5-cm-incre.text: Slide target toward nose in 0.5 cm increments while keeping shoulders stacked.

slow-figure-eight-pursuit-work-to-polish.text: Slow figure-eight pursuit work to polish eye-only movement and quiet the cervical spine.

smooth-and-steady-no-jerky-jumps-feb20b9.text: Smooth and steady, no jerky jumps

smooth-and-steady-round-each-loop-no-jer.text: Smooth and steady round each loop — no jerky jumps.

stack-difficulty-by-adding-category-rule.text: Stack difficulty by adding category rules (e.g., only blue objects).

start-2-m-from-chart-heel-to-toe-walk-to.text: Start 2 m from chart, heel-to-toe walk toward/away.

start-60-bpm-add-5-bpm-once-accuracy-90-.text: Start 60 bpm; add +5 bpm once accuracy ≥ 90% for two sessions.

start-at-arm-s-length-with-sharp-focus-1.text: Start at arm’s length with sharp focus.

step-read-the-line-next-step-9354081a.text: Step... read the line... next step

still-with-me-tap-resume-when-ready-9164.text: Still with me? Tap resume when ready.

switch-to-e-directional-cues-midway-to-v.text: Switch to E-directional cues midway to vary stimulus.

switch-to-vertical-loops-then-the-infini.text: Switch to vertical loops, then the infinity path.

tap-the-matching-arrow-up-left-right-or-.text: Tap the matching arrow: up, left, right, or down on the fixed pad.

tap-the-target-the-instant-it-appears-th.text: Tap the target the instant it appears — the sweep cycles through all four quadrants, then reverses.

tap-the-target-the-instant-it-flashes-at.text: Tap the target the instant it flashes at the edge.

the-patch-gets-fainter-as-you-get-calls-.text: The patch gets fainter as you get calls right, and clearer after a miss.

trace-the-horizontal-sweep-with-eyes-onl.text: Trace the horizontal sweep with eyes only for 60 sec.

trace-the-infinity-path-smooth-and-stead.text: Trace the infinity path. Smooth and steady.

trust-your-reach-as-targets-creep-outwar.text: Trust your reach as targets creep outward

walk-heel-to-toe-while-reading-down-a-pr.text: Walk heel-to-toe while reading down a projected Snellen line to cement gains in motion.

watch-for-a-rule-flip-on-the-ladder-same.text: Watch for a rule flip on the ladder — same side, then back to crossed

watch-the-pattern-then-tap-the-matching-.text: Watch the pattern, then tap the matching direction.

watch-the-target-jump-read-the-letter-ea.text: Watch the target jump — read the letter each time it flashes.
